instructions_to_main_agent: You are building a world-class AI Growth Agency website. Adhere STRICTLY to the dark theme, using ONLY the provided color palette. Implement smooth scrolling (Lenis), a custom cursor, parallax effects, and glowing gradients. Do NOT use generic fonts like Inter for headings. Use Framer Motion extensively for scroll reveals, hover states, and micro-interactions. Create a high-end, cinematic feel with lots of negative space. ALL interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes.

spacing_and_layout.bento_strategy: Use asymmetric bento grids for Services and Case Studies. Avoid perfect symmetry.

visual_enhancers.glowing_button: relative inline-flex h-14 items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-gradient-to-r from-[#6C63FF] via-[#8B5CF6] to-[#00E5FF] px-10 font-medium text-white shadow-[0_0_30px_rgba(108,99,255,0.4)] transition-all duration-300 hover:shadow-[0_0_50px_rgba(0,229,255,0.6)] hover:scale-105 active:scale-95
visual_enhancers.secondary_button: relative inline-flex h-14 items-center justify-center rounded-full border border-white/10 bg-[#101827]/50 px-10 font-medium text-white backdrop-blur-md transition-all hover:bg-white/5 hover:border-white/20
visual_enhancers.animated_border: relative rounded-2xl p-[1px] bg-gradient-to-b from-white/10 to-transparent hover:from-[#6C63FF] hover:to-[#00E5FF] transition-all duration-500
visual_enhancers.floating_blob: absolute rounded-full mix-blend-screen filter blur-[100px] opacity-30 animate-pulse
visual_enhancers.cursor: Implement a custom Framer Motion cursor that follows the mouse and expands on hoverable elements (mix-blend-difference or soft glow).

hero.description: Abstract data analytics dashboard for hero section visual

client_logos.description: Apply CSS filter: grayscale(1) brightness(2) to make it pure white/transparent
Apply CSS filter: grayscale(1) brightness(2) to make it pure white/transparent

components_blueprint.page_loader: Full screen black overlay (#050816). Center logo text growing with letter-spacing transition. Fades out upwards after 2 seconds.
components_blueprint.navigation: Sticky top glassmorphic header (bg-[#050816]/80 backdrop-blur-md). Logo left, links center, CTA right. Minimal bottom border (border-white/5).
components_blueprint.hero: Split layout. Left: Massive H1 (Cabinet Grotesk, text-5xl md:text-7xl), text gradient on 'AI Systems', two CTA buttons. Right: Framer Motion floating image of dashboard with glowing blob behind it. Bottom: Trusted by scrolling marquee (react-fast-marquee).
components_blueprint.services: Grid layout. 14 cards. Use a mix of col-span-1 and col-span-2 to create a bento-style look. Each card has an icon (lucide-react), title, short text, and subtle hover-gradient border.
components_blueprint.why_choose_us: 4 columns. Large numbers or icons glowing with primary color. Minimalist typography.
components_blueprint.process: Vertical or horizontal timeline. Use Framer Motion useScroll to animate an SVG line drawing connecting the 5 steps as the user scrolls down.
components_blueprint.case_studies: Large cards. Left side text (Problem/Solution/Result), right side image with parallax effect.
components_blueprint.testimonials: Carousel using Embla or Framer Motion. 5-star icons, client photo, elegant quote typography.
components_blueprint.stats: Large numbers using react-countup, triggered when in view.
components_blueprint.faq: Shadcn Accordion. Dark theme overrides (bg-transparent, border-white/10).
components_blueprint.footer: Massive bottom padding. Huge brand text 'OVERXATECH' at the bottom. Links above it.
components_blueprint.contact_page: Split layout. Left: Contact info, large typography. Right: High-end form using Shadcn (dark inputs, glowing focus rings, floating labels if possible).

animation_guidelines.scroll_reveal: { initial: { opacity: 0, y: 40 }, whileInView: { opacity: 1, y: 0 }, viewport: { once: true, margin: '-100px' }, transition: { duration: 0.8, ease: [0.16, 1, 0.3, 1] } }
animation_guidelines.stagger_children: Use for grids and lists to cascade elements in.
animation_guidelines.parallax: Use useScroll and useTransform for hero images and background blobs.
